name: Roast Pork Lo Mein
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb fresh noodles, boiled until soft; drain and rinse
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------SAUCE
Mix ---------------------------------
6 tablespoons oyster sauce (add more to taste)
1/2 teaspoon sugar
1 dash black pepper, a small amount
Note: Dried Noodles: 5 cups cooked noodles = 1 lb; Fresh Noodles: 2 1/2 cups cooked noodles = 1 lb
- Heat wok until smoking hot.
- Add oil and let heat.
- Add salt; stir.
- Add pork and sherry; stir fry quickly.
- Add cabbage, bean sprouts, and water chestnuts; stir fry for about 45 seconds.
- Add stock and place noodles on top. Cover and cook for 1 minute.
- Uncover and stir.
- Add sauce mix; stir until evenly seasoned.
- Serve!
